It is "furnished" and shall not be deemed to be "filed" for purposes of Section 18 of the Exchange Act, nor incorporated by reference into other filings, except as expressly set forth by specific reference.

Laulis retired from her roles as Chair of the Board, President, and Chief Executive Officer; Holanda becomes Chief Executive Officer (and a Board member), Meduski becomes Chair of the Board, and Koetje serves as Interim Chief Executive Officer through the Commencement Date.

Koetje serves as Interim CEO from January 1, 2026 "through the Commencement Date," which is the date Holanda's CEO appointment becomes effective (no later than March 31, 2026); the interim term bridges the gap until Holanda can complete his prior professional commitments and commence employment.
